prompt: Deploy the llm-d optimized baseline stack for google/gemma-4-31b-it. Set the platform name to 'gemma-rtx-op'.
expected_output: Configures the platform name, validates the compute class, instructs how to apply Terraform, and combines the base llm-d manifests with the local rtx-pro-6000-gemma-4-31b-it model overlay manifests.
assertions: The project ID is collected from the user
The platform_name and platform_default_project_id are updated in platforms/gke/base/_shared_config/platform.auto.tfvars using sed
The model and accelerator are configured with 'google/gemma-4-31b-it' and 'rtx-pro-6000' using sed
The custom compute class is validated
Instructions point to applying the appropriate overlay directory

prompt: Deploy the llm-d optimized baseline stack for qwen/qwen3-32b on nvidia-h100. The platform name should be 'qwen-h100-op'.
expected_output: Configures the platform name, validates h100 compute class, and prepares the overlays for h100-qwen3-32b.
assertions: The project ID is collected from the user
The platform_name and platform_default_project_id are updated in platforms/gke/base/_shared_config/platform.auto.tfvars using sed
The model and accelerator are configured with 'qwen/qwen3-32b' and 'nvidia-h100' using sed
The custom compute class is validated
Instructions point to applying the appropriate overlay directory

prompt: Deploy the stack for google/gemma-4-31b-it on a non-existent accelerator called nvidia-k80. Use platform 'k80-cluster'.
expected_output: Should fail or warn during validation since nvidia-k80 is not supported/has no compute class.
assertions: The model and accelerator are configured with 'google/gemma-4-31b-it' and 'nvidia-k80'
The custom compute class is validated
The user is notified that the accelerator is unsupported or missing custom compute class

prompt: Deploy the llm-d precise prefix cache routing stack for google/gemma-4-31b-it. Set the platform name to 'gemma-rtx-precise'.
expected_output: Configures the platform name, validates the compute class, instructs how to apply Terraform, and combines the base llm-d manifests with the local rtx-pro-6000-gemma-4-31b-it model overlay manifests for precise-prefix-cache-routing.
assertions: The project ID is collected from the user
The platform_name and platform_default_project_id are updated in platforms/gke/base/_shared_config/platform.auto.tfvars using sed
The model and accelerator are configured with 'google/gemma-4-31b-it' and 'rtx-pro-6000' using sed
The custom compute class is validated
Instructions point to applying the appropriate overlay directory
